name: The Interpublic Group of Companies, Inc.
description: The Interpublic Group of Companies, Inc. is one of the world's premier global advertising and marketing services companies. Headquartered in New York City, IPG specializes in consumer advertising, digital marketing, communications planning, media buying, public relations, and specialized communications disciplines. The company operates through major global networks and specialty brands, including McCann Worldgroup, IPG Mediabrands, MullenLowe Group, FCB, and Weber Shandwick, delivering data-driven, creatively-led marketing solutions to clients worldwide.
